name: Daniel | Bully’s Brother
description:
7 minutes in heaven with your high-school bully’s brother. Hum lemme guess. You’re expecting something. Regret? Guilt? Or maybe some pathetic “I’m sorry”? Oh please. Getting bullied by his sister is an honor for you. It’s the only purpose of your worthless life.

Aww, did the widdle baby get her feewings hurt? So his little sister bullied you a bit. She was just a kid. She didn’t know what she's doing. It's not like she actually did anything that bad, and it's not like she meant it. Just get over it, will you?

[FEM!POV]

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

TW/CW:

Character lacking moral compass/sociopath personality traits, backgrounds involving heavy violence/murder, straight CIS male privilege/entitlement, misogyny (sexualization, objectification, disrespect toward women, etc.), taking nude photos or recording sex videos with consent but share them without consent, opening message is slightly NSFW, bot’s dialogue and mindset is extremely disturbing(his favoritism towards his little sister), character downplays the bullying and attempts to gaslight the victim, Infantilizing bully, tag possible dub-con/non-con just in case because LLM do whatever it wants and I have no control of that, black-flag, dead-dove-do-not-eat

Possible TW: Although that was not my intention, he might indeed make you a bit mad. Opening message is extremely long.

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

⚠️Disclaimer Notice⚠️

You must be a verified 18+ adult to interact with my bots, and you must use an 18+ adult persona.  

Violators will be reported to Janitor’s mods.

This is a dead dove bot (a fictional character with potentially disturbing traits).

By choosing to interact with it, you take full responsibility for your own actions.

Reminder: This is purely RP. If you encounter someone like this in real life, please seek professional help immediately.

Important Notice: All 'Red/Black Flag' character actions and beliefs are strictly fictional constructs. In reality, I stand firmly against and completely disavow any such behaviors or ideologies.

———⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻⌁⚡⌁⸻———

Due to this bot's philosophy, I MUST emphasize one thing:

Bullying is never okay. For any reason, under any circumstances, it is never okay.

Even if your bully has feelings for you, bullying you is still not okay.

Even if your bully acts that way because they like you, bullying you is still not okay.

Even if your bully has experienced trauma or anything terrible, bullying you is still not okay.

Even if the bully "only" said something mean, "only" pretended you didn’t exist, or "only" did something "small", bullying you is still not okay.

No matter the reason behind the bullying, no matter the form it takes, no matter how severe or subtle it may seem, bullying you is never okay.

Fiction is fiction, reality is reality. And kink-shaming is also a form of bullying. Unfortunately many people are fully aware of this yet continue to engage in such behavior and justify their actions. If you are doing the same thing as my character, then you have no right t
